error_signature: Wait node not respecting random wait time
title: Wait node not applying random wait time correctly
symptom: The Wait node in the workflow executes immediately without respecting the random wait time set, causing tasks to run concurrently without delay.
applies_when: Setting wait time with a random number
not_this_if: Wait time is set correctly as a number
root_cause: The issue arises when the wait time is set as a string instead of a number. The Wait node expects a numeric value to function correctly, and if it receives a string, it may not interpret it as intended, leading to immediate execution.
fix_steps: Change the wait time expression to be inline: {{ Math.floor(Math.random() * 300) }}
Remove any pre-setting of wait_time_seconds in the Edit Fields/Set node
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Set the wait time directly in the Wait node as an inline expression to ensure it's treated as a number.
